{{Short description|none}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Belize women's national football team}}
{{Use mdy dates|date=November 2023}}
{{Infobox National football team
| Name                  = Belize
| Badge                 = Belize_national_football_team_logo.png
| Badge_size            = 190px
| Nickname              = ''The Jaguars''<br>''The Unbelizeables''
| Association           = [[Football Federation of Belize]] (FFB)
| Confederation         = [[CONCACAF]] (North America)
| Sub-confederation     = [[Central American Football Union|UNCAF]] (Central America)
| Coach                 = Philip Marin
| Captain               = [[Woodrow West]]
| Most caps             = [[Deon McCaulay]] (63)
| Top scorer            = [[Deon McCaulay]] (28)
| Home Stadium          = [[FFB Stadium]]
| FIFA Trigramme        = BLZ
| FIFA Rank             = {{FIFA World Rankings|BLZ}}
| FIFA max              = 114
| FIFA max date         = April–June 2016
| FIFA min              = 201
| FIFA min date         = November 2007 – January 2008
| Elo Rank              = {{World Football Elo Ratings|Belize}}
| Elo max               = 166
| Elo max date          = September 2018
| Elo min               = 189
| Elo min date          = January 2008
| pattern_la1           = _blz1819h
| pattern_b1            = _blz1819h
| pattern_ra1           = _blz1819h
| pattern_sh1           = _blz1819h
| pattern_so1           = 
| leftarm1              = 0000FF
| body1                 = FFFFFF
| rightarm1             = 0000FF
| shorts1               = FFFFFF
| socks1                = FFFFFF
| pattern_la2           = _blz1819a
| pattern_b2            = _blz1819a
| pattern_ra2           = _blz1819a
| pattern_sh2           = _blz1819a
| pattern_so2           = 
| leftarm2              = 
| body2                 = 0000FF
| rightarm2             = 
| shorts2               = 0000FF
| socks2                = 0000FF
| First game            = '''''as British Honduras'''''<br>{{fb|British Honduras}} 1–0 {{fb-rt|HON|1898}}<br>([[British Honduras]]; 19 February 1928)<br>'''''as Belize'''''<br>{{fb-rt|BLZ|1981}} 0–2 {{fb|CAN}}<br>([[Belize City]], Belize; 8 December 1983)
| Largest win           = {{fb|BLZ|1981}} 7–1 {{fb-rt|NIC}}<br>([[Belize City]], Belize; 17 April 2002)
| Largest loss          = {{fb|CRC}} 7–0 {{fb-rt|BLZ|1981}}<br>([[San José, Costa Rica|San José]], Costa Rica; 17 March 1999)<br>{{fb|MEX}} 7–0 {{fb-rt|BLZ|1981}}<br>([[Monterrey]], Mexico; 21 June 2008)<br>{{fb|BLZ}} 0–7 {{fb-rt|CRC}}<br>([[Belmopan]], Belize; 21 March 2025) 
| Regional name         = [[CONCACAF Gold Cup]]
| Regional cup apps     = 1
| Regional cup first    = [[2013 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2013]]
| Regional cup best     = Group stage ([[2013 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2013]])
| 2ndRegional name      = [[Copa Centroamericana]]
| 2ndRegional cup apps  = 11
| 2ndRegional cup first = [[1995 UNCAF Nations Cup|1995]]
| 2ndRegional cup best  = Fourth place ([[2013 Copa Centroamericana|2013]])
}}

The '''Belize national football team''' represents [[Belize]] in men's international [[Association football|football]], which is governed by the [[Football Federation of Belize]] founded in 1980. It has been a member of [[FIFA]] since 1986 and a member of [[CONCACAF]] since 1992. Regionally, it is a member of [[Central American Football Union|UNCAF]] in the Central American Zone.

Belize has never qualified for the [[FIFA World Cup]], but has participated once for the [[CONCACAF Gold Cup]] ([[2013 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2013]]). It has participated three times in League B and once in League C of the [[CONCACAF Nations League]]. Regionally, the team finished fourth place in the [[Copa Centroamericana]] in [[2013 Copa Centroamericana|2013]].

Belize's debut in international competitions was in the [[1995 UNCAF Nations Cup]]. Their first appearance in World Cup qualifiers was in the [[1998 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|1998 CONCACAF qualification]]. The team as [[British Honduras]] achieved its first victory in 1928, defeating [[Honduras national football team|Honduras]] 1–0, which was also the first match in the team's history. As Belize, it achieved its first victory in 2001, defeating [[Nicaragua national football team|Nicaragua]] 2–0.

==History==
===Overview===
Named [[British Honduras]] whilst under British colonial rule, the country's first international match was in 1928, beating [[Honduras national football team|Honduras]] 1–0. Following independence, Belize's first game came on 8 December 1983, in a 2–0 loss against [[Canada men's national soccer team|Canada]] in Belize.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.eloratings.net/Belize|title=World Football Elo Ratings: Belize|access-date=28 September 2019|website=Elo Ratings|archive-date=October 27, 2020|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20201027154016/https://www.eloratings.net/Belize|url-status=live}}</ref> Although Belize gained independence from the [[United Kingdom]] in 1981 (and many of the UK's current colonies have international teams), Belize did not begin to regularly play international football until 1995. It made its debut at the [[1995 UNCAF Nations Cup]] and was eliminated in the first round after losing to [[El Salvador national football team|El Salvador]] and [[Costa Rica national football team|Costa Rica]].

Belize has never qualified for the [[FIFA World Cup|World Cup]] but finished fourth in the [[2013 Copa Centroamericana]]. Their fourth-place finish in the 2013 Copa Centroamericana gave Belize its first qualification to a major international competition, that being the [[2013 CONCACAF Gold Cup]].

===June 2011 suspension by FIFA===
On 15 June 2011, Belize kicked off its [[2014 FIFA World Cup qualification]] campaign against minnows [[Montserrat national football team|Montserrat]], winning 2–5 away in a match played in the [[Ato Boldon Stadium]] in [[Couva]], [[Trinidad and Tobago|Trinidad]]. However, the return which was scheduled for June 19 was postponed by FIFA when they
suspended the FFB due to governmental interference.<ref>[https://web.archive.org/web/20190108093226/https://www.fifa.com/worldcup/news/suspension-the-football-federation-belize-1454212 Suspension of the Football Federation of Belize]&nbsp;– FIFA</ref>

==Team image==
In February 2023 the Football Federation of Belize unveiled a new logo that would represent Belize’s national teams. Created by Rolando Ramirez, the new logo prominently features a Jaguar, the nickname of the team. The FFB hoped that the new image would promote unity and pride in the Belize football community.<ref name="new Belize National Football Team logo">{{cite web |last1=Iglesias |first1=Rubén Morales |title=Unleashing the power of The Jaguars: Football Federation of Belize reveals new Belize National Football Team logo by Rolando Ramirez |date=February 10, 2023 |url=https://www.breakingbelizenews.com/2023/02/10/unleashing-the-power-of-the-jaguars-football-federation-of-belize-reveals-new-belize-national-football-team-logo-by-rolando-ramirez/ |publisher=Breaking Belize News |access-date=27 March 2024}}</ref>

===Kit sponsorship===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:left;"
|-
! Kit supplier
! Period
|-
| Runic || 2005–2006
|-
| {{flagicon|MEX}} [[Keuka (brand)|Keuka]] || 2008
|-
| {{flagicon|GUA}} Rotto || 2011
|-
| {{flagicon|GUA}} Spadd || 2012
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[Nike, Inc.|Nike]] || 2013
|-
| None || 2014–Present
|}

==Stadium==
[[FFB Stadium]] in [[Belmopan]] is the home stadium for the Belize national football team. Prior to this stadium, Belize had no facilities that met FIFA specifications. Apart from this Belize has many fields to play on but with no facilities for the players.

==Results and fixtures==
{{Main|Belize national football team results}}
The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Win|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Draw|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Loss|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFFF|Fixture|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

===2025===
{{footballbox collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round#Group D|2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]]
|date       = 4 June
|time       = {{UTZ|19:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|MSR}}
|score      = 1–0
|team2      = {{fb|BLZ}}
|goals1     = Mark Rogers {{goal|2}}
|goals2     = 
|stadium    = [[Ato Boldon Stadium]], [[Trinidad and Tobago]]
|attendance = 93
|referee    = Kimbell Ward ([[St. Kitts and Nevis Football Association|St. Kitts and Nevis]])
|report     = https://www.fifa.com/fifaplus/en/match-centre/match/520/288301/288302/400017753
|result     = L
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|format      = 1
| round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round#Group D|2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]]
| date       = 7 June
| time       = {{UTZ|19:00|-6}}
| team1      = {{fb-rt|BLZ}}
| score      = 0–2
| team2      = {{fb|PAN}}
| report     = https://www.fifa.com/fifaplus/en/match-centre/match/520/288301/288302/400017761
| goals1     =
| goals2     =
*[[Fidel Escobar|Escobar]] {{goal|10}}
*[[Eduardo Guerrero (footballer)|Guerrero]] {{goal|50}}
| location   = [[Belmopan]], Belize
| stadium    = [[FFB Field]]
| attendance =
| referee    = Julio Luna ([[National Football Federation of Guatemala|Guatemala]])
| result     = L
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[Exhibition game#Association football|Friendly]]
|date       = 14 October
|time       = {{UTZ|15:00|−5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|VEN}}
|score      = ''{{small|Cancelled}}''
|team2      = {{fb|BLZ}}
|report     = 
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
|location   = [[Bridgeview, Illinois|Bridgeview]], United States
|stadium    = [[SeatGeek Stadium]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     = P
|note       = Match cancelled due to unrest from [[Operation Midway Blitz]].
}}
{{football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2025-26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 15 November
|time       = 19:00 [[Atlantic Standard Time|AST]]
|team1      = {{fb-rt|MAF}}
|score      = 0–1
|team2      = {{fb|BLZ}}
|report     = https://www.facebook.com/share/p/17TABX3CQZ/?mibextid=wwXIfr
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
*[[Desmond Wade|Wade]] {{goal|26}}
|location   = [[Basseterre]], [[Saint Kitts and Nevis]]
|stadium    = [[SKNFA Technical Center]]
|attendance = 
|referee    =
|result     = W
}}
{{football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2025-26 CONCACAF Series]] 
|date       = 18 November
|time       = 16:00 [[Atlantic Standard Time|AST]]
|team1      = {{fb-rt|SKN}}
|score      = 2–6
|team2      = {{fb|BLZ}}
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2025-11-18/st-kitts-and-nevis-vs-belize/3936749
|goals1     =
*[[Javern Matthew|Matthew]] {{goal|71||85}}
|goals2     =
*[[Desmond Wade|Wade]] {{goal|9||28||43}}
*[[Marlon Meza Jr.|Meza Jr.]] {{goal|80||82}}
*[[Eugene Martínez (footballer, born 1997)|Martinez]] {{goal|90+3}}
|location   = [[Basseterre]], [[Saint Kitts and Nevis]]
|stadium    = [[SKNFA Technical Center]]
|attendance = 
|referee    =
|result     = W
}}

===2026===
{{football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2025-26 CONCACAF Series]] 
|date       = 27 March
|time       = {{UTZ|19:30|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|BLZ}}
|score      = 2–3
|team2      = {{fb|SXM}}
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-28/belize-vs-sint-maarten/4095368
|goals1     = *[[Eldon Reneau|Reneau]] {{goal|37|pen.}}
*[[Jordy Polanco|Polanco]] {{goal|55}}
|goals2     = *[[T-Shawn Illidge|Illidge]] {{goal|34}}
*[[Chovanie Amatkarijo|Amatkarijo]] {{goal|77||90+1}}
|location   = [[Santiago de los Caballeros]] (Dominican Republic)
|stadium    = [[Estadio Cibao FC]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = [[Wikelson Bonnet]] ([[Haitian Football Federation|Haiti]])
|result     = L
}}
{{football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 30 March
|time       = {{UTZ|16:30|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|GUY}}
|score      = 3–1
|team2      = {{fb|BLZ}}
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-30/guyana-vs-belize/4095374
|goals1     = [[Osaze De Rosario|De Rosario]] {{goal|2||22||90+1}}
|goals2     = [[Desmond Wade]] {{goal|8}}
|location   = [[Santiago de los Caballeros]] (Dominican Republic)
|stadium    = [[Estadio Cibao FC]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Eric de la Cruz ([[Football Association of Cuba|Cuba]])
|result     = L
}}

==Coaching staff==
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!style="color:#0000FF;background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #0000FF"|Name
!style="color:#0000FF;background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #0000FF"|Nat
!style="color:#0000FF;background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #0000FF"|Position
|-
|Philip Marin ''Interim''
|{{Flagicon|Belize}}
|Head coach
|-
|Joaquín Lobón 
|{{Flagicon|Belize}}
|Technical Consultant
|-
|Norman Koko
|{{Flagicon|Belize}}
|rowspan="2"| Assistant head coach
|-
|[[Dale Pelayo Sr.]]
|{{Flagicon|Belize}}
|-
|TBD
|{{Flagicon|Belize}}
|Goalkeeping coach
|-
|TBD
|{{Flagicon|Belize}}
|Physical Trainer
|-
|Thomas Rivars
|{{Flagicon|Belize}}
|Physiotherapist
|}

===Coaching history===

Since the creation of the national team in 1995, several coaches have been in charge of managing Belize. From 1995 to 1996, [[Winston Michael]] was appointed as Belize's first ever manager.

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!Manager
!Period in charge
!Played
!Won
!Drawn
!Lost
!Win %
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Belize|1981}} {{sortname|Winston|Michael}}
|1995–1996
{{WDL|decimals=1|4
|0
|0
|4}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Argentina}} {{sortname|Manuel|Bilches}}
|1999–2000
{{WDL|decimals=1|6
|0
|1
|5}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Costa Rica}} {{sortname|Leroy|Sherrier Lewis}}
|2001
{{WDL|decimals=1|5
|3
|1
|1}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Brazil}} {{sortname|Eduardo|Santana}}
|2003
{{WDL|decimals=1|0
|0
|0
|0}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Belize|1981}} {{sortname|Anthony|Adderly}}
|2003–2006
{{WDL|decimals=1|5
|0
|0
|5}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Brazil}} [[Antonio Carlos Vieira]]
|2006–2007
{{WDL|decimals=1|3
|0
|0
|3}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Guatemala}} {{sortname|Palmiro|Salas}}
|2008
{{WDL|decimals=1|2
|1
|0
|1}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|United States}} {{sortname|Ian|Mork}}
|2008
{{WDL|decimals=1|4
|0
|1
|3}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Mexico}} {{sortname|Renan|Couoh}}
|2008–2009
{{WDL|decimals=1|3
|0
|1
|2}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Honduras|1949}} [[José de la Paz Herrera]]
|2010–2012
{{WDL|decimals=1|7
|2
|2
|3}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Costa Rica}} [[Leroy Sherrier Lewis]]
|2012–2013
{{WDL|decimals=1|5
|1
|1
|3}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Belize|1981}} Charlie Slusher
|2013
{{WDL|decimals=1|1
|0
|1
|0}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|United States}} {{sortname|Ian|Mork}}
|2013–2014
{{WDL|decimals=1|4
|0
|1
|3}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Costa Rica}} [[Leroy Sherrier Lewis]]
|2014–2015
{{WDL|decimals=1|3
|0
|0
|3}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Brazil}} [[Jorge Nunez (football coach)|Jorge Nunez]]
|2015–2016
{{WDL|decimals=1|4
|2
|2
|0}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Poland}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[Richard Orlowski]]	
|2016–2018
{{WDL|decimals=1|5
|0
|1
|4}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Guatemala}} {{sortname|Palmiro|Salas}}
|2018–2019
{{WDL|decimals=1|6
|3
|1
|2}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Italy}} {{sortname|Vincenzo Alberto|Annese}}
|2019–2020
{{WDL|decimals=1|6
|2
|1
|3}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Belize}} [[Dale Pelayo Sr.]]
|2020–2021
{{WDL|decimals=1|3
|1
|0
|2}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Spain}} [[David Pérez (football manager)|David Perez Asensio]]
|2022–2024
{{WDL|decimals=1|17
|3
|4
|10}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Belize}} Charlie Slusher
|2024-2025
{{WDL|decimals=1|8
|4
|0
|4}}
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|{{flagicon|Belize}} Philip Marin
|2025-''present''
{{WDL|decimals=1|4
|2
|0
|2}}
|}

==Players==

===Current squad===
The following players were called up for the [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]] friendly matches against [[Sint Maarten national football team|Sint Maarten]] and [[Guyana national football team|Guyana]] on 27 and 30 March 2026, respectively.<ref>{{cite web|title=Roster Reveal: Senior Men’s National Team|url=https://www.facebook.com/footballbelize/posts/pfbid0MYawqvUm4yEUUE2uPQvaBdGqzyZNnqks2asiG3EH1sS14LwZVmNjXjoZM8WA22Fwl|via=[[Facebook]]|publisher=[[Football Federation of Belize]]|date=24 March 2026}}</ref>

''Caps and goals correct as of 30 March 2026, after the match against [[Guyana national football team|Guyana]].''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=22|pos=GK|name=[[Woodrow West]]|age={{birth date and age|1985|9|19|df=y}}|caps=52|goals=0|club=[[Verdes FC|Verdes]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Charles Tillett]]|age={{birth date and age|2001|7|29|df=y}}|caps=22|goals=0|club=[[Progresso FC|Progresso]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=2|pos=DF|name=[[Eugene Martínez (footballer, born 1997)|Pele Martínez]]|age={{birth date and age|1997|10|20|df=y}}|caps=23|goals=3|club=[[Belmopan FC|Belmopan]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=5|pos=DF|name=[[Deshawon Nembhard]]|age={{bda|1994|10|8|df=y}}|caps=21|goals=1|club=[[Belmopan FC|Belmopan]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Norman Anderson (footballer)|Norman Anderson]]|age={{birth date and age|1997|1|25|df=y}}|caps=19|goals=0|club=[[Napoles FC|Napoles]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=16|pos=DF|name=[[Alence Ayala]]|age={{birth date and age|1999|4|29|df=yes}}|caps=13|goals=0|club=[[Verdes FC|Verdes]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=17|pos=DF|name=[[Jaylen Lennan]]|age={{birth date and age|2002|6|17|df=y}}|caps=9|goals=0|club=[[Verdes FC|Verdes]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jordan Casanova]]|age={{birth date and age|2004|4|30|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Belmopan FC|Belmopan]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Calvin Reid]]|age={{birth date and age|2004|1|28|df=yes}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Progresso FC|Progresso]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=10|pos=MF|name=[[Jordy Polanco]]|age={{birth date and age|1996|6|8|df=y}}|caps=36|goals=7|club=[[Verdes FC|Verdes]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=14|pos=MF|name=[[Darrel Myvette]]|age={{bda|1993|12|15|df=y}}|caps=29|goals=0|club=[[Verdes FC|Verdes]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=7|pos=MF|name=[[Nahjib Guerra]]|age={{bda|1994|8|18|df=y}}|caps=28|goals=0|club=[[Verdes FC|Verdes]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=6|pos=MF|name=[[Andir Chi]]|age={{bda|2000|11|17|df=y}}|caps=17|goals=0|club=[[Progresso FC|Progresso]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=20|pos=MF|name=[[Eldon Reneau]]|age={{birth date and age|2003|05|22|df=yes}}|caps=17|goals=2|club=[[Verdes FC|Verdes]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=15|pos=MF|name=[[Freybin Pagoada]]|age={{bda|2002|3|22|df=y}}|caps=9|goals=0|club=[[Progresso FC|Progresso]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Orlando Velásquez]]|age={{birth date and age|1998|12|18|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=2|club=[[Verdes FC|Verdes]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Marlon Meza Jr.]]|age={{birth date and age|2009|03|26|df=yes}}|caps=4|goals=2|club=[[Mount Pleasant F.A.|Mount Pleasant]]|clubnat=JAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Kenyon Smith (footballer)|Kenyon Smith]]|age=|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Napoles FC|Napoles]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Jaheim Mena]]|age={{bda|2006|2|23|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[Belmopan FC|Belmopan]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=9|pos=FW|name=[[Desmond Wade]]|age={{birth date and age|1997|08|31|df=yes}}|caps=5|goals=5|club=[[Verdes FC|Verdes]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Daijon Daniels]]|age={{birth date and age|2003|2|2|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Napoles FC|Napoles]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Félix Martínez (footballer)|Félix Martínez]]|age={{birth date and age|2005|7|9|df=yes}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Verdes FC|Verdes]]|clubnat=BLZ}}
{{nat fs end}}

===Recent call-ups===
The following players have been called up within the past 12 months.
<!--Sorted by position, most recent call-up, caps, goals and last name.-->
{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Carlos Palacios (Belizean footballer)|Carlos Palacios]]|age={{birth date and age|2005|6|1|df=yes}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Wagiya SC|Wagiya]]|clubnat=BLZ|latest=v. {{fb|SKN}}, 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Lucas Gallego]]|age={{birth date and age|2009|10|15|df=yes}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Team Boca]]|clubnat=BLZ|latest=v. {{fb|PAN}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Horace Avila]]|age={{bda|1999|9|18|df=y}}|caps=15|goals=1|club=[[Bethel Royals football|Bethel Royals]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|SKN}}, 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Devin Garbutt]]|age={{birth date and age|2007|5|5|df=yes}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Mango Creek United]]|clubnat=BLZ|latest=v. {{fb|SKN}}, 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jamal Brooks (footballer)|Jamal Brooks]]|age={{bda|2001|12|23|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=USAO Drovers|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|SKN}}, 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Harlan Casanova]]|age={{birth date and age|1997|12|3|df=yes}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Progresso FC|Progresso]]|clubnat=BLZ|latest=v. {{fb|PAN}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Izon Gill]]|age={{birth date and age|1999|12|27|df=yes}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[Belmopan FC|Belmopan]]|clubnat=BLZ|latest=v. {{fb|SKN}}, 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Breyden Olivas]]|age={{birth date and age|2008|1|8|df=yes}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Silk Grass Ballers]]|clubnat=BLZ|latest=v. {{fb|SKN}}, 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Warren Moss]]|age={{birth date and age|1999|10|13|df=y}}|caps=15|goals=1|club=[[Free agent]]|latest=v. {{fb|PAN}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Krisean Lopez]]|age={{bda|1998|11|2|df=y}}|caps=38|goals=5|club=[[Verdes FC|Verdes]]|clubnat=BLZ|latest=v. {{fb|SKN}}, 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Jaden Dubon]]|age={{birth date and age|2004|8|5|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[George Washington Revolutionaries]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|SKN}}, 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Marlon Meza]]|age={{birth date and age|1986|9|12|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Belmopan Bandits FSC|Belmopan Bandits]]|clubnat=BLZ|latest=v. {{fb|SKN}}, 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Carlos Bernárdez]]|age={{bda|1992|12|28|df=y}}|caps=21|goals=7|club=[[C.D. Victoria|Victoria]]|clubnat=HON|latest=v. {{fb|PAN}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Moisés Hernández (Belize footballer)|Moisés Hernández]]|age={{bda|1998|5|26|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=1|club=[[San Pedro Pirates FC|San Pedro Pirates]]|clubnat=BLZ|latest=v. {{fb|PAN}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs end}}

==Records==
{{updated|30 March 2026}}<ref>{{cite web |title=Belize |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/21/Belize.html |website=National Football Teams |access-date=August 9, 2022 |archive-date=April 19, 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230419162725/https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/21/2023/Belize.html |url-status=live }}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Belize.''

[[File:Woodrow West.jpg|thumb|120px|[[Woodrow West]] has played 52 games for Belize]]

===Most appearances===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
!width=150px|Player
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
!width=100px|Career
|-
| 1 ||align=left| [[Deon McCaulay]]|| 63 || 28 || 2007–2022
|-
| 2 ||align=left| [[Elroy Smith]] || 61 || 6 || 2004–2019
|-
| 3 ||align=left| [[Ian Gaynair]] || 57 || 2 || 2007–2022
|-
| 4||align=left| [[:fr:Evral Trapp|Evral Trapp]] || 55 || 0 || 2010–2024
|-
| 5 ||align=left| '''[[Woodrow West]]''' || 52 || 0 || 2008–present 
|-
| rowspan=2|6 ||align=left| [[:fr:Dalton Eiley|Dalton Eiley]] || 41 || 0 || 2005–2019
|-
|align=left| [[:fr:Daniel Jiménez|Daniel Jiménez]] || 41 || 2 || 2008–2019
|-
| 8 ||align=left|[[Harrison Róchez]] || 40 || 5 || 2004–2019
|-
| 9 ||align=left| '''[[Krisean Lopez]]''' || 38 || 5 || 2018–present
|-
| 10 ||align=left| [[:fr:Trevor Lennan|Trevor Lennan]] || 37 || 1 || 2005–2019
|}

===Top goalscorers===

<!---NATIONAL FOOTBALL TEAM WEBSITE DOES NOT HAVE THE DATA FOR BELIZE'S 7-1 VICTORY OVER NICARAGUA (17 APRIL 2002) WHICH IS THE CAUSE THE DISCREPANCIES BETWEEN THE TWO LISTS--->
{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
!width=150px|Player
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
!width=100px|Career
|-
| 1 ||align=left| [[Deon McCaulay]] || 28 || 63 || {{#expr:28/63 round 2}} || 2007–2022
|-
| 2 ||align=left| '''[[Carlos Bernárdez]]''' || 7 || 21 || {{#expr:7/21 round 2}} || 2019–present
|-
| rowspan=3|3 ||align=left| [[:pl:Elroy Kuylen|Elroy Kuylen]] || 6 || 33 || {{#expr:6/33 round 2}} || 2009–2019
|-
|align=left| '''[[:pl:Jordy Polanco|Jordy Polanco]]''' || 6 || 36 || {{#expr:6/36 round 2}} || 2015–present
|-
|align=left| [[Elroy Smith]] || 6 || 61 || {{#expr:6/61 round 2}} || 2004–2019
|-
| rowspan=4|6 ||align=left| '''[[Desmond Wade]]''' || 5 || 5 || {{#expr:5/5 round 2}} || 2021–present
|-
|align=left| [[:de:Dion Frazer|Dion Frazer]] || 5 || 8 || {{#expr:5/8 round 2}} || 2000–2008
|-
|align=left| '''[[Krisean Lopez]]''' || 5 || 38 || {{#expr:5/38 round 2}} || 2018–present
|-
|align=left| [[Harrison Róchez]] || 5 || 40 || {{#expr:5/40 round 2}} || 2004–2019
|-
| rowspan=4|10 ||align=left| [[Norman Nuñez]] || 3 || 11 || {{#expr:3/11 round 2}} || 1995–2005
|-
|align=left| [[:vi:Vallan Symms|Vallan Symms]] || 3 || 20 || {{#expr:3/20 round 2}} || 2000–2011
|-
|align=left| '''[[Eugene Martínez (footballer, born 1997)|Pele Martínez]]''' || 3 || 23 || {{#expr:3/23 round 2}} || 2022–present
|-
|align=left| '''[[Michael Salazar]]''' || 3 || 23 || {{#expr:3/23 round 2}} || 2013–present
|-
|}

==Competitive record==
===FIFA World Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
!colspan=10|[[FIFA World Cup]] record 
!rowspan=16|
!colspan=6|[[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]] record 
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!Squad
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
| [[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]] to [[1978 FIFA World Cup|1978]]||colspan=9|''Part of {{flag|United Kingdom}}''
|colspan=6|''Part of {{flag|United Kingdom}}''
|-
| [[1982 FIFA World Cup|1982]] and [[1986 FIFA World Cup|1986]]||colspan=9|''Not a FIFA member''
|colspan=6|''Not a FIFA member''
|-
| [[1990 FIFA World Cup|1990]] and [[1994 FIFA World Cup|1994]]||colspan=9|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Declined participation''
|-
| {{flagicon|France|1974}} [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]||colspan=9 rowspan=8|''Did not qualify''
| 2
| 0
| 0
| 2
| 2
| 6
|-
| {{flagicon|South Korea|1997}} {{flagicon|Japan}} [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]
| 4
| 0
| 1
| 3
| 2
| 10
|-
| {{flagicon|Germany}} [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]
| 2
| 0
| 0
| 2
| 0
| 8
|-
| {{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]
| 4
| 1
| 1
| 2
| 4
| 11
|-
| {{flagicon|Brazil}} [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]
| 8
| 4
| 1
| 3
| 17
| 13
|-
| {{flagicon|Russia}} [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]
| 6
| 2
| 3
| 1
| 7
| 6
|-
| {{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]
| 3
| 1
| 0
| 2
| 5
| 5
|-
| {{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
| 4
| 0
| 0
| 4
| 1
| 10
|-
| {{flagicon|Morocco}} {{flagicon|Portugal}} {{flagicon|Spain}} [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]||colspan=9 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|colspan=6 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|-
| {{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]
|-
!Total!!—!!0/8!!colspan=7|—
!33!!8!!6!!19!!38!!69
|}

===CONCACAF Gold Cup===
{{main|Belize at the CONCACAF Gold Cup}}
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|-
!colspan=10|[[CONCACAF Championship]] / [[CONCACAF Gold Cup|Gold Cup]] record
!rowspan=22|
!colspan=6|[[CONCACAF Gold Cup qualification|Qualification]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!Squad
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1963 CONCACAF Championship|1963]] to [[1981 CONCACAF Championship|1981]]||colspan=9|''Part of {{flag|United Kingdom}}''
|colspan=6|''Part of {{flag|United Kingdom}}''
|-
|[[File:Location North America.svg|20px]] [[1985 CONCACAF Championship|1985]]||colspan=9|''Not a CONCACAF member''
|colspan=6|''Not a CONCACAF member''
|-
|[[1989 CONCACAF Championship|1989]] to [[1993 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1993]]||colspan=9|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[1996 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1996]]||colspan=9 rowspan=4|''Did not qualify''
|colspan=6 rowspan=4|''[[Copa Centroamericana]]''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[1998 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1998]]
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2000 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2000]]
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2002 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2002]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2003 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2003]]
|colspan=9|''Did not participate''
|colspan=6|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2005 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2005]]||colspan=9 rowspan=4|''Did not qualify''
|colspan=6 rowspan=7|''[[Copa Centroamericana]]''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2007 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2007]]
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2009 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2009]]
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2011 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2011]]
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2013 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2013]]
|Group stage
|12th
|3
|0
|0
|3
|1
|11
|[[2013 CONCACAF Gold Cup squads#Belize|Squad]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2015 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2015]]
|colspan=9 rowspan=6|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2017 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2017]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Costa Rica}} {{flagicon|Jamaica}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2019 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2019]]
|4
|2
|0
|2
|6
|3
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2021 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2021]]||colspan=6 rowspan=2|''[[CONCACAF Nations League]]''
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2023 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2023]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2025]]
|8
|5
|1
|2
|14
|16
|-
!Total!!Group stage!!1/16!!3!!0!!0!!3!!1!!11!!—
!57!!10!!6!!41!!48!!116
|}
{| class="wikitable collapsible collapsed" style="text-align:center; font-size:90%;"
|-
!colspan=2|CONCACAF Championship / Gold Cup history
|-
!First match
|{{fb-rt|BLZ}} 1–6 {{fb|USA}}<br>(9 July 2013; [[Portland, Oregon|Portland]], United States)
|-
!Biggest win
|—
|-
!Biggest defeat 
|{{fb-rt|BLZ}} 1–6 {{fb|USA}}<br>(9 July 2013; [[Portland, Oregon|Portland]], United States)
|-
!Best result
|rowspan=2|Group stage ([[2013 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2013]])
|-
!Worst result
|}

===CONCACAF Nations League===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|- 
!colspan=22|[[CONCACAF Nations League]] record
|-
!colspan=11|League phase
!rowspan=8|
!colspan=10|Final phase
|-
!Season
!{{Tooltip|Div.|Division}}
!Group
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|P/R|Promotion/Relegation}}
!Finals
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Squad|Finals Squad Only}}
|-
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League|2019−20]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League B#Group A|A]]
|12th||6||2||0||4||6||12||{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2021 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2021]]||colspan=9 rowspan=5|''Ineligible''
|-
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League|2022–23]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League B#Group D|D]]
|16th||6||0||1||5||2||10||{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2023 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2023]]
|-
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League|2023–24]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League B#Group C|C]]
|11th||6||2||1||3||5||7||{{fall}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2024 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2024]]
|-
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League|2024–25]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group B|B]]
|2nd||4||4||0||0||9||0||{{rise}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2025 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2025]]
|-
|[[2026–27 CONCACAF Nations League|2026–27]]
|[[2026–27 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]||colspan=9|''To be determined''
|[[2027 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2027]]
|-
!colspan=4|Total!!22!!8!!2!!12!!22!!29!!—
!Total!!colspan=9|—
|}
{| class="wikitable collapsible collapsed" style="text-align:center; font-size:90%;"
|-
!colspan=2|CONCACAF Nations League history
|-
!First match
|{{fb|GUF}} 3–0 {{fb-rt|BLZ}}<br>(5 September 2019; [[Cayenne]], French Guiana)
|-
!Biggest win
|{{fb|TCA}} 0–4 {{fb-rt|BLZ}}<br>(7 September 2024; [[Providenciales]], Turks and Caicos Islands)
|-
!Biggest defeat
|{{fb|SKN}} 4–0 {{fb-rt|BLZ}}<br>(10 October 2019; [[Belmopan]], Belize)
|-
!Best result
|12th – League B ([[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League|2019–20]])
|-
!Worst result
|Relegation League C ([[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League|2023–24]])
|}

===Copa Centroamericana===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
!colspan=9|[[Copa Centroamericana]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1991 UNCAF Nations Cup|1991]] and [[1993 UNCAF Nations Cup|1993]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|SLV}} [[1995 UNCAF Nations Cup|1995]]||Group stage||6th||2||0||0||2||1||5
|-
|{{flagicon|GUA}} [[1997 UNCAF Nations Cup|1997]]||Preliminary round||7th||2||0||1||1||1||2
|-
|{{flagicon|CRC}} [[1999 UNCAF Nations Cup|1999]]||rowspan=2|Group stage||6th||2||0||0||2||1||12
|-
|{{flagicon|HON|1949}} [[2001 UNCAF Nations Cup|2001]]||6th||2||0||1||1||3||7
|-
|{{flagicon|PAN}} [[2003 UNCAF Nations Cup|2003]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|GUA}} [[2005 UNCAF Nations Cup|2005]]||rowspan=4|Group stage||7th||3||0||0||3||0||7
|-
|{{flagicon|SLV}} [[2007 UNCAF Nations Cup|2007]]||7th||3||0||0||3||3||7
|-
|{{flagicon|HON|1949}} [[2009 UNCAF Nations Cup|2009]]||7th||3||0||1||2||3||7
|-
|{{flagicon|PAN}} [[2011 Copa Centroamericana|2011]]||7th||3||0||1||2||3||8
|- style="background:#9acdff;"
|{{flagicon|CRC}} [[2013 Copa Centroamericana|2013]]||'''Fourth place'''||'''4th'''||'''5'''||'''1'''||'''1'''||'''3'''||'''2'''||'''4'''
|-
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2014 Copa Centroamericana|2014]]||rowspan=2|Group stage||7th||3||0||0||3||1||6
|-
|{{flagicon|PAN}} [[2017 Copa Centroamericana|2017]]||6th||5||0||1||4||2||10
|-
!Total
!Fourth place
!11/11
!30
!1
!6
!23
!19
!69
|}

Belize's international debut in the 1995 UNCAF Nations Cup.<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.rsssf.org/tablesb/belize-intres.html |title=Belize - List of International Matches |access-date=2010-11-24 |url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20090420034811/http://www.rsssf.com/tablesb/belize-intres.html |archive-date=April 20, 2009 |df=mdy }}</ref>

==Head-to-head record==
''Updated on 18 November 2025 after match against [[Saint Kitts and Nevis national football team|Saint Kitts and Nevis]]''<ref>{{cite web|url=http://eloratings.net/Belize|title=World Football Elo Ratings: Belize|publisher=Elo Ratings|access-date=24 October 2018}}</ref>

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Positive Record|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Neutral Record|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Negative Record|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center"
! Opponent !! P !! W !! D !! L !! GF !! GA !! GF
|-
|- style="background:#CCFFCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|AIA}}
|2||2||0||0||2||0||+2
|-
|- style="background:#CCFFCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|BAH}}
|1||1||0||0||4||0||+4
|-
|- style="background:#CCFFCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|BAR}}
|2||1||1||0||1||0||+1
|-
|- style="background:#FFCCCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|BER}}
|2||0||1||1||1||2||−1
|-
|- style="background:#FFCCCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|CAN}}
|5||0||1||4||1||14||−13
|-
|- style="background:#FFFACD"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|CAY}}
|2||0||2||0||1||1||0
|-
|- style="background:#FFCCCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|CRC}}
|8||0||0||8||2||32||−30
|-
|- style="background:#FFCCCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|CUB}}
|3||1||0||2||3||9||−6
|-
|- style="background:#FFFACD"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|DOM}}
|4||2||0||2||5||5||0
|-
|- style="background:#FFCCCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|SLV}}
|10||0||0||10||6||29||−23
|-
|- style="background:#FFFACD"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|GYF}}
|8||4||2||2||10||7||+3
|-
|- style="background:#FFCCCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|GRN}}
|5||2||0||3||11||11||0
|-
|- style="background:#FFCCCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|GUA}}
|13||0||4||9||10||23||−13
|-
|- style="background:#FFFACD"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|GUY}}
|2||1||0||1||4||3||+1
|-
|- style="background:#FFCCCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|HAI}}
|1||0||0||1||0||2||–2
|-
|- style="background:#FFCCCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|HON}}
|10||1||0||9||4||24||−20
|-
|- style="background:#FFFACD"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|JAM}}
|1||0||1||0||2||2||0
|-
|- style="background:#FFCCCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|MEX}}
|2||0||0||2||0||9||−9
|-
|- style="background:#CCFFCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|MSR}}
|4||2||0||2||8||5||+3
|-
|- style="background:#FFCCCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|NCA}}
|13||4||3||6||19||25||–6
|-
|- style="background:#FFCCCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|PAN}}
|7||0||2||5||3||12||−9
|-
|- style="background:#CCFFCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|PUR}}
|3||2||1||0||5||1||+4
|-
|- style="background:#CCFFCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|SMN}}
|1||1||0||0||1||0||+1
|- style="background:#CCFFCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|SKN}}
|5||3||1||1||11||8||+3
|-
|- style="background:#FFFACD"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|VIN}}
|6||2||2||2||6||7||–1
|-
|- style="background:#CCFFCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|TCA}}
|3||3||0||0||12||0||+12
|- style="background:#FFFACD"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|TRI}}
|2||0||2||0||0||0||0
|-
|- style="background:#FFCCCC"
|style="text-align:left"|{{fb|USA}}
|1||0||0||1||1||6||−5
|-
|- class="sortbottom"
!Total !! 124 !! 33 !! 22 !! 69 !! 132 !! 234 !! −102
|}

==References==
{{Reflist}}

==External links==
* {{Official website|https://www.footballfederationbelize.com/}} of the Football Federation of Belize
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20070604014905/http://www.fifa.com/associations/association=blz/index.html Belize] at FIFA.com (archived 4 June 2007)
* {{instagram|belizejaguars}}

{{Belize national football team}}
{{Football in Belize}}
{{CONCACAF teams}}
{{National sports teams of Belize}}

[[Category:Belize national football team| ]]
[[Category:Central American national association football teams]]
[[Category:1995 establishments in Belize]]
[[Category:Association football clubs established in 1995]]
